questions.question: A hiker mixes $2$ liters of $15%$ insect repellent with $3$ liters of $30%$ insect repellent. What is the concentration of the mixture?

A park ranger needs to mix $10$ kg of birdseed that is $25%$ sunflower seeds with some birdseed that is $40%$ sunflower seeds to get a mixture that is $30%$ sunflower seeds. How many kg of the $40%$ sunflower seeds birdseed should be added?
A fuel mixture for a hiking trip contains $30%$ diesel and $70%$ gasoline. If $20$ liters of the mixture is used, how many liters of diesel were used?
A river has a flow rate of $50$ liters per minute. If $15%$ of the water is from a nearby stream, how many liters of water from the stream flow into the river per hour?

A group of hikers are preparing for a trip and need to mix $15$ kg of $20%$ protein energy bars with some $30%$ protein energy bars to get a mixture that is $25%$ protein. How many kg of the $30%$ protein energy bars should be added?

A nature reserve has two types of animal food: one that is $40%$ nuts and another that is $60%$ nuts. If $30$ kg of the $40%$ nuts food is mixed with some of the $60%$ nuts food to get a $50%$ nuts mixture, how many kg of the $60%$ nuts food is added?
A camper mixes $25$ liters of $80%$ concentrated juice with $30$ liters of $20%$ concentrated juice. What is the concentration of the resulting mixture?
A hiker mixes $10$ kg of trail mix that is $30%$ chocolate chips with $20$ kg of trail mix that is $10%$ chocolate chips. What percentage of chocolate chips is in the final mixture?

A wildlife sanctuary has two types of monkey food. One type is $20%$ fruit and the other type is $50%$ fruit. If the sanctuary has $50$ kg of the $20%$ fruit food and wants to mix it with some of the $50%$ fruit food to get a $30%$ fruit mixture, how many kg of the $50%$ fruit food should be added? Show all work and calculations.

A camper is preparing for a trip and needs to mix $30$ liters of $25%$ concentrated cleaner with some $40%$ concentrated cleaner to get a $30%$ concentrated cleaner mixture. If $10$ liters of the $30%$ concentrated cleaner mixture is used, how many liters of the $40%$ concentrated cleaner were added to the mixture? Show all work and calculations.

teacher_rules: Read each question carefully before answering.
Use the space provided for each question to show your work and calculations.
Check your work before submitting your test.
